title: local_llm.py hardening: fix max_tokens default + _cache_offset + prompt_cache threading
description: Three changes to datum/local_llm.py: (1) fix DEFAULTS["max_tokens"] from 131072 to 8192; (2) add _cache_offset(cache) helper that returns cache[0].offset or 0; (3) thread prompt_cache through multi_turn_phase() for delta-only prefill on turns 1+.
acceptance_criteria: check_context_budget returns fits=True for 100-token prompt + 8192 output vs 131072 window
multi_turn_phase creates one prompt_cache before the turn loop
Turns 1+ receive delta tokens only; fallback to full prompt if offset >= len(tokens)
red_note: check_context_budget("hello world", 8192) fails before fix (returns fits=False). _cache_offset not importable. multi_turn_phase does not call make_prompt_cache.

title: Tests: test_local_llm_hardening.py — 5 tests for budget check and cache offset
description: Write tests/test_local_llm_hardening.py covering: budget check fix, prompt-too-large failure, cache_offset empty, cache_offset populated, multi_turn uses prompt_cache.
red_note: All 5 tests fail before task-001 is implemented.
